characters.name: Steve
characters.description: Steve runs the big factory by the river. He seems nice, but some of his records are missing.
characters.suspicious_detail: His waste logs have gaps every few months — right when the river turned dirty.
characters.innocent_explanation: The missing records were from a computer upgrade. Inspectors checked his pipes and everything was okay.
characters.culprit_explanation: Steve was secretly dumping factory chemicals into the storm drain! Lab tests matched chemicals from his factory.

characters.name: Tung Tung Tung Sahur
characters.description: Tung works at the factory at night. He can go almost anywhere on site.
characters.suspicious_detail: Workers saw his van near the river drain at 3am — several times!
characters.innocent_explanation: Security cameras showed Tung was fixing broken machines. He just drove past the drain on his way back.
characters.culprit_explanation: Tung faked his night reports and poured chemicals into the river during storms to save money.
